privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified and accurate. The task requires configuring Copper Point of Sale for a fictional business 'Meridian Goods & Supply' in Cleveland, OH (real location). Configuration requirements include: setting business name, address (4720 Commerce Parkway, Suite 100, Cleveland, OH 44135), phone ((216) 555-0294 - fictional number using reserved 555 exchange), default tax rate of 8.00%, and four inventory categories (Food & Grocery 0%, Electronics & Tech 9.50%, Apparel 8.00%, Gift Cards 0%). The verification task requires creating a test item 'Varsity Top Test' priced at $60.00 in the Apparel category, processing a transaction, and documenting the calculated tax of $4.80 and total of $64.80 in a verification file. All numerical values and requirements are mathematically correct and consistently documented across source files.
